tenders.body: Tanzania Official Seed Certification Institute (TOSCI), via NeST
tenders.title: Public Awareness and E-Label System Integration Consultancy
tenders.eligibility: Consultancy firms with experience in digital certification systems, e-labelling, supply chain authentication and stakeholder sensitization in the agricultural inputs sector
tenders.notes: Designing and executing sensitization protocols for seed sector stakeholders on deployment of cryptographic e-labels to verify input supply-chain authenticity. Published via the National e-Procurement System of Tanzania (NeST).

tenders.body: United Nations International Procurement / Government of Tanzania (DMDP2 Portfolio)
tenders.title: Feasibility Studies for Circular Organic Waste Management & Composting, Dar es Salaam
tenders.eligibility: Consulting firms with expertise in circular economy, organic waste recovery, urban waste stream mapping and composting logistics
tenders.notes: Mapping urban and market organic streams in Dar es Salaam to identify scalable, technology-backed options for corporate organic waste recovery and regional composting logistics. Flagship DMDP2 portfolio, published via UN Global Marketplace.

tenders.body: The Royal Norwegian Society for Development (Norges Vel)
tenders.title: Value Chain Evaluation & Resilient Agriculture Mid-Term Review, Tanzania
tenders.eligibility: Specialised multi-country evaluation teams with expertise in agricultural value chain assessment, climate-resilient farming systems and producer-owned business ecosystem analysis
tenders.notes: Seeking a specialised evaluation team to assess agricultural value chains and build data-driven approaches to optimise climate-resilient farming and producer-owned business ecosystems in Tanzania. Published via Devex International Procurement Board.

tenders.body: United Republic of Tanzania / East African Community
tenders.title: Expressions of Interest for Construction Supervision of One Stop Border Post (OSBP)
tenders.eligibility: Firms with construction supervision experience for cross-border infrastructure projects
tenders.notes: Provision of supervision services for Phase 1 construction of the Manyovu/Mugina One Stop Border Post on the Tanzania side, to streamline cross-border trade logistics.

tenders.title: Supply and Commissioning of Solar Pumping Systems
tenders.eligibility: Suppliers of solar pumping systems with commissioning capability
tenders.notes: Supply and commissioning of solar-powered pumping systems for agricultural water access.

tenders.title: Procurement of 1 Tractor and Its Implements Under AFDP Project
tenders.eligibility: Suppliers of agricultural tractors and implements
tenders.notes: Procurement of one tractor and its implements under the Agriculture Financing and Development Programme (AFDP). Note: could not independently confirm this exact 2026 deadline/reference; a similarly-titled TARI tractor tender found via search had a different deadline (17 Nov 2025) and reference number -- verify directly on tari.go.tz before relying on this date.

tenders.title: Routine Road Maintenance and Safety Infrastructure Works (Bunda District)
tenders.eligibility: Road maintenance and safety infrastructure contractors
tenders.notes: Culvert installations, spot improvements, and periodic safety maintenance across 19.7km of rural road connections in Bunda District. Deadline extended from 17 Jul to 24 Jul 2026 per 18 Jul bulletin.

tenders.title: Consultancy Services for Landing Sites and Fish Market Georeferencing
tenders.volume: 1,200 landing sites and 20 major fish markets
tenders.eligibility: Firms with GIS/georeferencing and needs-assessment experience
tenders.notes: Needs assessments and complete georeferencing mapping for 1,200 landing sites and 20 major fish markets across inland and marine waterbodies.

tenders.title: Routine Maintenance of Key Grains Transportation Corridors (Singida)
tenders.notes: Preventive road maintenance and routine structural works along the paved Singida - Malendi road section to safeguard logistics corridors.

tenders.body: Bank of Tanzania - Zanzibar Sub-Head Office
tenders.title: Supply and Installation of 200KVA Three-Phase Static UPS
tenders.eligibility: Suppliers of industrial UPS/power backup systems
tenders.notes: Complete supply, electrical integration, testing, and commissioning of a heavy-duty static UPS system to secure transaction networks.

tenders.title: Routine Maintenance and Major Repair Works along Rungwa - Itigi - Mkiwa Unpaved Trunk Road (T022)
tenders.notes: Routine maintenance and major repair works along the unpaved Rungwa - Itigi - Mkiwa trunk road (T022).

tenders.title: Spot Improvement Works along Tomondo - Vuleni, Kibungo Kungwe, and Ngerengere Corridors
tenders.notes: Spot improvement works along the Tomondo - Vuleni, Kibungo Kungwe, and Ngerengere road corridors.

tenders.title: Routine/Recurrent Maintenance along Same - Kisiwani - Mkomazi East Trunk Corridor
tenders.notes: Routine and recurrent maintenance along the Same - Kisiwani - Mkomazi East trunk road corridor.

tenders.title: Supply of Surveillance Drones for Field Operations
tenders.notes: Supply of surveillance drones to support field operations for the Ministry of Livestock and Fisheries.

tenders.title: Routine Maintenance along Lyambalyamfipa - Mpanda Trunk Road (T009) & Kawajense - Mnyamasi Jct
tenders.notes: Routine maintenance along the Lyambalyamfipa - Mpanda trunk road (T009) and Kawajense - Mnyamasi junction, safeguarding grain-belt logistics corridors in Katavi. Listed in the 22 Jul bulletin; not independently confirmed -- verify on the NeST portal (filter by tender no.) before relying on the exact date.
